arts.ttl: Manchester United line up Real Madrid midfielder as Casemiro replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United have lined up Real Madrid midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni as a potential long-term replacement for Casemiro. Casemiro is free to leave Manchester United as the Red Devils look to offload the 32-year-old this month. The Brazilian’s decline in performances and high wages have meant United are keen to sell in their bid to raise […] The post Manchester United line up Real Madrid midfielder as Casemiro replacement first appeared on The Football Faithful.
